# HPD-ML-TimeSeries

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries`
- Version: `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Exported types: 26

## HPD.ML.TimeSeries

- [`AlertingMode`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-alertingmode.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`AnomalyScorer`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-anomalyscorer.md) - Shared anomaly scoring pipeline: raw score → p-value (KDE) → martingale → alert.
- [`AnomalySide`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-anomalyside.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ErrorFunction`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-errorfunction.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`IidAnomalyState`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-iidanomalystate.md) - Minimal state for IID anomaly detection. No model — just scoring history and martingale.
- [`IidChangePointDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-iidchangepointdetector.md) - IScanTransform for IID change point detection. Same as IidSpikeDetector but defaults to martingale alerting and resets martingale on alert.
- [`IidSpikeDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-iidspikedetector.md) - IScanTransform for IID spike detection. No model — the input value IS the raw anomaly score. Applies KDE p-value and optional martingale scoring.
- [`MartingaleType`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-martingaletype.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`RankSelectionMethod`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-rankselectionmethod.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ScanTransformAdapter<TState>`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-scantransformadapter-tstate.md) - Adapts an IScanTransform&lt;TState&gt; into an ITransform by managing state internally. The DataHandle returned by Apply() processes rows sequentially, maintaining state.
- [`SeasonalityDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-seasonalitydetector.md) - FFT-based seasonality period detection. Returns the dominant period or -1 if no significant periodicity found.
- [`SlidingWindow<T>`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-slidingwindow-t.md) - Fixed-size circular buffer for sliding window operations. Mutable for performance; use Clone() for checkpointing.
- [`SpectralResidualDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-spectralresidualdetector.md) - IScanTransform for spectral residual anomaly detection. No training needed — computes FFT spectral residual on each window. Window size must be a power of 2.
- [`SpectralResidualState`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-spectralresidualstate.md) - State for spectral residual anomaly detection. Just a sliding window.
- [`SsaAnomalyLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaanomalylearner.md) - Trains an SSA model for anomaly detection (spike or change point). Fit() computes SVD of the trajectory matrix from training data.
- [`SsaAnomalyOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaanomalyoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`SsaAnomalyState`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaanomalystate.md) - Inference state for SSA-based anomaly detection.
- [`SsaChangePointDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssachangepointdetector.md) - IScanTransform for SSA-based change point detection. Same scoring as spike detection but with martingale-based alerting and martingale reset on alert (cooldown).
- [`SsaForecastOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaforecastoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`SsaForecastState`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaforecaststate.md) - Inference state for SSA forecasting.
- [`SsaForecaster`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaforecaster.md) - IScanTransform for SSA-based multi-step forecasting. Each observation: consume → update state → forecast h steps ahead.
- [`SsaForecastingLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaforecastinglearner.md) - Trains an SSA model for forecasting. Identical SVD training to SsaAnomalyLearner, but returns a SsaForecaster transform.
- [`SsaModelParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssamodelparameters.md) - Learned SSA model parameters: SVD decomposition of the trajectory matrix and derived auto-regressive coefficients. Immutable after training.
- [`SsaSpikeDetector`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-ssaspikedetector.md) - IScanTransform for SSA-based spike detection. Each observation: predict → score → p-value → alert.
- [`StlDecomposition`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-stldecomposition.md) - STL (Seasonal-Trend decomposition using LOESS). Decomposes a time series into seasonal, trend, and residual components.
- [`TimeSeriesExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-timeseries-timeseriesextensions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
